title: System-R structural constants used in the Lambda_munu and Einstein-gap analyses, in both the algebraic-rounded form and the lattice-measured form.
convention: algebraic_rounded values are the closed-form Pythagoras + integer-uniqueness derivation; lattice_measured values are extracted from the canonical regime fits.

alpha_xi.comment: Phase-coherence amplitude on the canonical regime.

gamma.comment: Pythagorean complement of alpha_xi (alpha_xi^2 + gamma^2 = 1 to leading order).

D_Omega.comment: DM/DE branching coefficient on the canonical regime.

alpha_xi_squared.comment: Asymptotic Lambda_t = T_00^rec / T_00 on the within-P5 ladder.

alpha_xi_sq_minus_half_gamma_sq.comment: Lambda^mu_mu trace asymptote under the 2+1 anisotropy.

alpha_xi_sq_plus_gamma_sq.comment: Pythagoras-complementarity sum (target hypothesis was retracted on 12-point ladder).
